_retired: This example file is no longer used. Module config is now stored in config/exchangeadmin.db (SQLite). Set Conference Rooms config keys via the Module Config admin page at /module-config/ConferenceRooms. Keys include DelineaSecretId, DefaultArbiterGroup, ExecConfCoordinatorsGroup, ConfExecAdminsGroup, ConfExecVPsGroup, ConfAdminsGroup, ConfCEOGroup, ConfExceptionGroup, ADGTAdminsGroup, RestrictedContactEmail, ExecContactEmail, ADGTContactEmail.
